seoTitle: North Parramatta vs North Richmond — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between North Parramatta and North Richmond. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: North Parramatta vs North Richmond: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in North Parramatta and North Richmond.
heading: North Parramatta vs North Richmond — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between North Parramatta, New South Wales and North Richmond, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: North Parramatta has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to North Richmond (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is North Parramatta or North Richmond safer from flooding?
faq.answer: North Parramatta has a flood risk score of 26/100, while North Richmond scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: North Parramatta scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. North Richmond scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in North Parramatta or North Richmond?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. North Parramatta has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
